use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet};

type Graph = HashMap<u64, Vec<u64>>;

fn has_path(graph: &Graph, start: u64, end: u64) -> bool {
    let mut visited = HashSet::new();
    dfs(graph, start, end, &mut visited)
}

fn dfs(graph: &Graph, current: u64, end: u64, visited: &mut HashSet<u64>) -> bool {
    if current == end {
        return true;
    }
    if !visited.insert(current) {
        return false;
    }
    if let Some(neighbors) = graph.get(&current) {
        for &next in neighbors {
            if dfs(graph, next, end, visited) {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}
